description: Search Ads 360 is Google's search campaign management product for managing and measuring advertising across search engines. Its APIs are used for reporting data access and for uploading or managing conversion-related data.
summary: Search Ads 360 exposes two documented developer HTTP APIs: the newer Search Ads 360 Reporting API on `searchads360.googleapis.com` and the legacy/ongoing Search Ads 360 API v2 for conversions and ID-mapping on `www.googleapis.com/doubleclicksearch/v2`, both using Google OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens.
